message:
test(search_v3): add 12 tests for backfill, batch indexing, and filter coverage

New tests cover gaps identified in the search_v3 module:

- Backfill tests: empty database, nonexistent file error path, sqlite:// and
  sqlite:/// URL prefix stripping, URL path extraction logic
- Batch indexing edge cases: empty fields don't crash, duplicate IDs create
  separate docs, many-message searchability
- Filter coverage: importance filter (urgent), agent_name/sender filter,
  project isolation filter, thread_id filter

Total search_v3 tests: 43 → 55

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
